TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi sealed SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp extends System.Enum

Docs.summary: Specifies the opto-electronic transfer function (EOTF/OETF) of a color space using Coding-Independent Code Points (CICP) as defined in ITU-T H.273.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
`SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp` identifies the transfer function (gamma curve) of a color space using the standardized numeric codes from ITU-T H.273 (formerly ISO/IEC 23091-2). These values are used in container formats such as HEIF, AVIF, and WebP to signal the electro-optical or opto-electronic transfer characteristics of image data.
Pass a value from this enumeration together with a value from <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp> to <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace.CreateCicp(SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp,SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp)> to construct a standard color space.
Because this is an enumeration, no disposal is required.
## Examples
```csharp // Create a standard sRGB color space using CICP identifiers using var colorSpace = SKColorSpace.CreateCicp( SKColorspacePrimariesCicp.Rec709, SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp.Iec6196621); ```

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Hlg = int32(18)

Docs.summary: Hybrid Log-Gamma (HLG) transfer function defined in ITU-R BT.2100, used for broadcast HDR video (CICP code point 18).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Iec6196621 = int32(13)

Docs.summary: IEC 61966-2-1 transfer function, which defines the sRGB standard gamma curve (CICP code point 13).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Iec6196624 = int32(11)

Docs.summary: IEC 61966-2-4 transfer function, used for extended-gamut video (xvYCC) (CICP code point 11).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Linear = int32(8)

Docs.summary: Linear transfer function with no gamma encoding (CICP code point 8).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Pq = int32(16)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 2084 Perceptual Quantizer (PQ) transfer function defined in ITU-R BT.2100, used for HDR10 and Dolby Vision content (CICP code point 16).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec202010bit = int32(14)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.2020 transfer function for 10-bit content (CICP code point 14).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec202012bit = int32(15)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.2020 transfer function for 12-bit content (CICP code point 15).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec470SystemBg = int32(5)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.470 System B/G transfer function, assumed gamma of 2.8 (CICP code point 5).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec470SystemM = int32(4)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.470 System M transfer function, assumed gamma of 2.2 (CICP code point 4).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec601 = int32(6)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.601 / BT.709 transfer function used for standard-definition and high-definition video (CICP code point 6).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec709 = int32(1)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.709 transfer function used for high-definition video (CICP code point 1).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp SmpteSt240 = int32(7)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 240 transfer function, used for early HDTV production (CICP code point 7).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp SmpteSt4281 = int32(17)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 428-1 transfer function, used for Digital Cinema (CICP code point 17).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Unknown = int32(0)

Docs.summary: Unknown or unspecified transfer function (CICP code point 0).
